basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Programmer Assistant and Data Entry Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)
basic_details.post_name: Programmer Assistant 'A' and Data Entry Operator

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Computer Applications/ Electronics & communication or equivalent with 50% marks, 10+2 Pass with good typing speed of at least 30wpm
qualification.details: Programmer Assistant 'A': Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Computer Applications/ Electronics & communication Or Bachelor’s degree in Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Commerce, Operations Research with one year ‘A’ level of NIELIT/ PGDCA (50% Marks in aggregate or Equivalent grade in qualifying Degree/Diploma). Knowledge in large software Designing & Development using VB, .Net , JAVA, JSP, D2K, SQL server/Oracle 8i/9i DBA, WIN NT/Linux with knowledge of Hardware and Networking. Desirable: 5+ years of experience. Location: Meerut Data Entry Operator: 10+2 Pass with good typing speed of at least 30wpm. Working knowledge of MS-Office. Desirable: 5+ years of experience. Location: Meerut

selection_process: Document Verification Interview Typing Test Personal Interaction

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIELIT recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for NIELIT Programmer Assistant 'A' and Data Entry Operator posts is scheduled for 25th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Programmer Assistant 'A' post?
faq.answer: For the Programmer Assistant 'A' post, candidates need a Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Computer Applications/ Electronics & communication or equivalent with 50% marks, along with specific technical knowledge.

faq.question: Q3. What is the typing speed requirement for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Data Entry Operator position must have a good typing speed of at least 30 words per minute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these contract positions ranges from Rs. 38,832 to Rs. 77,837 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for the NIELIT recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 750/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110058. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The job type for these vacancies is contract-based.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age limits and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 2 vacancies have been announced for the posts of Programmer Assistant 'A' and Data Entry Operator.
